goal: Diff-based code review in fresh context
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Three-level test coverage section in TDD skill (unit, integration, E2E)
AC2: Integration test definition — calls production entry point AND asserts visible effect
AC3: Fixture validation against production schema before writing fixtures
AC4: Degenerate input rule — minimum set: empty, whitespace, max-length
AC5: Phase 3 blocking verification — import + assertion, not advisory
AC6: PIPELINE_GUIDE.md includes integration tests in Phase 3
AC7: Architecture dependency with gap-handling — ARCH GAP comment + handoff known_risks
AC8: No regression — existing tests pass, skill within size budget
